content: Emile Harmel is a Chief Creative Technologist, Systems Architect, and Founder based in Graz, Austria. With over 20 years of experience, he specializes in bridging complex backend architectures with intuitive, scalable user interfaces.
Emile's core philosophy is that 'every system is a story—every story, a system in disguise'. He views his role as a 'Systems Whisperer,' turning tangled pipelines into clean, living frameworks.

Emile builds digital worlds intended to 'make logic feel human and humanity feel designed'. He has transitioned from traditional frontend development to treating AI-native development and 'Agentic Coding' as the natural evolution of the craft.

Emile's technical stack includes React 19, Next.js 16 (App Router), TypeScript, and Python (FastAPI/Pydantic). He also works with Unreal Engine 5 (C++/Blueprints) and mobile ecosystems like Swift for iOS and React Native.

A specialist in AI orchestration, Emile utilizes tools such as Ollama, n8n, Claude Code, and multi-agent memory layers like Honcho. He uses AI agents as 'design sparring partners' to handle boilerplate and refactoring, allowing him to ship at a pace typically requiring 2-3 engineers.

Emile's approach to 'Vibe Coding' involves integrating local LLMs like Ollama to transform static forms into AI-augmented conversations. He maintains strict engineering discipline around state management and human-in-the-loop validation.
As Co-Founder of MonstoryX, Emile architected an immersive digital storytelling platform using Unreal Engine 5, custom C++ plugins, and backend logic via Nakama.

Emile developed Hermes, a multi-agent AI operating system on GCP that automates content production. The system uses a hub-and-spoke architecture with 'Herman' the orchestrator and serverless GPU workers to reduce costs by 95%.

Through his consultancy, Hobolabs Digital, Emile built Moxis, an AI-powered document intelligence platform. The platform uses a hybrid approach of geometric CV and Vision Language Models (VLMs) to classify and export form fields from legal contracts.
Emile contributed to high-stakes regulated projects, including the official German Gematik e-Prescription App (ePA) and Mazda's pan-European mobile ecosystem (My Mazda App).

Case Study highlight: Editorial Canvas Portfolio (This Website). An experimental, AI-native interactive portfolio where users chat with Emile's Digital Twin. Built using Next.js, React Flow, Vercel AI SDK, and Local RAG with Ollama, featuring autonomous node spawning and Brutalist aesthetics.

Project: RISE ePA+ (Electronic Patient Record)
Section: Introduction

# RISE ePA+ (Electronic Patient Record)

Project: RISE ePA+ (Electronic Patient Record)
Section: Overview

Overview

RISE ePA+ is an advanced digital health application that extends the standard German Electronic Patient Record (ePA) with powerful user-centric features. It modernizes the healthcare system by safely connecting patients with doctors, pharmacies, and insurance providers while offering intelligent health management tools directly on their smartphones.

Project: RISE ePA+ (Electronic Patient Record)
Section: Tech Stack

Tech Stack

- iOS Native
- Swift & SwiftUI
- gematik Security Standards Integrations

Project: RISE ePA+ (Electronic Patient Record)
Section: My Role & Contributions

My Role & Contributions

- **iOS Developer:** Core contributor to the native iOS application development.
- **Feature Engineering (SwiftUI):** Designed, developed, and maintained complex UI architectures and workflows utilizing modern SwiftUI, ensuring an accessible, highly responsive, and strictly secure patient user experience.

Project: RISE ePA+ (Electronic Patient Record)
Section: Interesting Details

Interesting Details

- **Intelligent Health Features:** The ePA+ ecosystem goes far beyond basic document storage. It includes interactive, natively built sub-modules like a comprehensive Health Diary (e.g., tracking migraines), a Preventive Care Manager, and dynamic Vaccination Recommendations.
- **Patient Empowerment:** Designed to encourage active patient participation and adherence (including rehab tracking) by bringing complex medical data into a fluid, easy-to-understand, mobile-first interface.
- **Top-Tier Security:** Because it handles highly sensitive medical data, all features were rigorously engineered to meet the strict regulatory and security specifications mandated by 'gematik'.

Project: RISE ePA+ (Electronic Patient Record)

Project: Find My Mazda (Mazda Motors Germany)
Section: Introduction

# Find My Mazda (Mazda Motors Germany)

Project: Find My Mazda (Mazda Motors Germany)
Section: Overview

Overview

An entertaining, personalized sales platform created for Mazda Motors Germany to help customers find their ideal vehicle. "Find My Mazda" is an intuitive online hub that connects inspiration and purchase, combining real-time availability checks, location-based searching, financing configuration, and direct test-drive bookings into a seamless experience.

Project: Find My Mazda (Mazda Motors Germany)
Section: Tech Stack

Tech Stack

- Vue.js (frontend bundled for native Mazda website embedding)
- Elastic Search Backend
- Node.js

Project: Find My Mazda (Mazda Motors Germany)
Section: My Role & Contributions

My Role & Contributions

- **Lead Developer:** Architected and developed the platform in collaboration with Demodern.de for Mazda.
- **Micro-Frontend Architecture:** Engineered the Vue application so it could be strictly bundled and seamlessly embedded directly into the existing Mazda.de infrastructure.
- **Search System:** Integrated a lightning-fast Elastic Search backend to handle real-time inventory filtering and location-based matching.

Project: Find My Mazda (Mazda Motors Germany)
Section: Interesting Details

Interesting Details

- **Conversational UX:** Replaced traditional sterile search filters with a playful dialogue. Six short questions gracefully guide users like a conversation to find the perfect model.
- **Real-Time Dynamic Results:** Search results update instantaneously with every input, showcasing accessory customizations and exactly which vehicles are locally available with precise pricing and offers.
- **Massive KPI Impact:** Following the launch, the platform achieved an 18% increase in overall conversion rate and a 30% rise in highly-qualified dealer inquiries. Dealers specifically praised the high relevance of leads, establishing the tool as a benchmark for customer-oriented online automotive selling.

Project: MonstoryX
Section: Introduction

# MonstoryX

Project: MonstoryX
Section: Overview

Overview

MonstoryX is an immersive 3D open-world educational game built in Unreal Engine 5. It transforms children from passive consumers into active digital directors through a "Voice-First Generative Loop." By leveraging a real-time Speech-to-Intent pipeline, the game allows children to direct AI-animated 'Monster Movies,' turning their speech into interactive stories and promoting literacy, empathy, and expressive language. It builds upon a proven pedagogical foundation already integrated into hundreds of schools, designed to directly combat the developmental delays caused by passive digital consumption.

Project: MonstoryX
Section: Tech Stack

Tech Stack

- **Engine:** Unreal Engine 5 (World Partition, Water, Landmass plugins, Control Rig, ActorCore)
- **AI & ML:** Generative AI (Hunyuan 3D AI for assets), Local On-device Transcription (Qwen), Native Voice Assistants
- **Backend/Systems:** C++, Blueprints, Node.js
- **Plugins:** Custom standalone `LootLockerIAP` plugin, proprietary `MonstoryReplaySystem` (Movie Maker)
- **Asset Pipeline:** Physical Plasticine Sculpting → Photography → Hunyuan 3D AI → Blender Rigging → UE5

Project: MonstoryX
Section: My Role & Contributions

My Role & Contributions

- **Chief Creative Technologist | Systems Architect | Founder:** Equal co-founder responsible for architecting the systems that make the educational vision technically possible, working precisely alongside pedagogical experts.
- **Voice-To-Intent Pipeline Engineer:** Developed the multilingual real-time speech-processing system that directly manipulates NPC Behavior Trees based on verbal communication, featuring seamless fallbacks to local on-device transcription models (Qwen) and touch interactions.
- **Engine Tech & Plugin Development:** Engineered modular UE5 tools, including the proprietary `MonstoryReplaySystem` to handle the heavy lifting for the 'Movie Maker' recording mode, and a custom `LootLockerIAP` integration.
- **Image-to-3D Pipeline Architect:** Designed an innovative hybrid physical-to-digital workflow. Characters are hand-sculpted in physical Plasticine, photographed, and processed through Hunyuan 3D AI before being fine-tuned, rigged in Blender, and animated using ActorCore in UE5.

Project: MonstoryX
Section: Deep Dive: Features & Mechanics

Deep Dive: Features & Mechanics

### Voice-First Generative Loop & Movie Maker

Children solve quests primarily through verbal communication. A custom 'Movie Maker' mode utilizing UE replay mechanics transforms players into directors. When a player records their script, the system transcribes it and plays it back entirely in the monster's unique cloned voice, allowing kids to playfully record, edit, and safely share their own cinematic 'Monster Flicks.' An autonomous narrative pipeline seamlessly transforms raw gameplay transcripts into cinematic animations.

### Companion Swap & Emotional Empathy

Players play alongside (or directly control) four unique monster companions that serve as a narrative mirror for children to learn empathy, emotional regulation, and personal growth:

- **Blorp (Blue):** Highly energetic and erratic, providing fast-paced interactions but needing help focusing constructively.
- **Trio (Yellow):** The "educator" who is cool and collected but occasionally prone to sudden bursts of panic, teaching children how to manage anxiety.
- **Lopsy (Orange):** The forever-optimistic caregiver who always has a little dancing step to model positivity and emotional support.
- **Mossie (Green):** Relatably struggles with learning difficulties and focus, trying his best to "get himself together" and overcome challenges.
  We've also introduced multi-touch gesture support for co-operative play, enabling two characters to be controlled simultaneously on the same screen to foster deep, shared problem-solving.

### Diverse Quest Ecosystem

Quests are structurally diverse to build 21st-century literacy and cognitive skills:

- **Core Language:** Evaluating "Fake News" (e.g., correcting "elephants have wings") and continuing open-ended narratives.
- **Mini-Games:** Mental arithmetic in "The Number Cave," teaching precise spatial language in "The Lost Monster Treasure Map," or interviewing NPCs using "Monster Mic Mode."
- **Environmental Problem-Solving:** Multi-stage quests like "Save the River Pipeline" that involve collecting trash, cleaning oil spills, and reviving plants.

### Computational Thinking & The Monster Loot Economy

Gameplay subtly introduces children to computational thinking via Movie Timers (duration limits), Movie Bins (asset storage), and Resource Management in a strict "no pay-to-win" closed-loop economy. Children earn "Monster Loot" (Wiggle Worms, Jiggly Jellies) naturally by completing voice-quests, enabling them to customize monsters or permanently upgrade abilities. Players can also craft treats like "Glowing Goo" at Cooking Stations to unlock dark caves or access new areas.

### AI Teacher Admin (B2B)

A dedicated "Teacher Architect" Dashboard bridges the gap between home and classroom environments. Teachers act as the "human-in-the-loop," interacting with LLM-powered personas to instantly generate curriculum-aligned quests. They audit and approve the AI's output before it dynamically populates the game logic, while monitoring student progress and audio recordings.

Project: moxis (XiTrust E-Digital Signature Platform)
Section: Introduction

# moxis (XiTrust E-Digital Signature Platform)

Project: moxis (XiTrust E-Digital Signature Platform)
Section: Overview

Overview

Spearheaded the architectural reinvention of an enterprise e-digital signature platform. Our core objective was to fundamentally prove that complex corporate data systems can feel fluid, intuitive, and human, rather than rigid and bureaucratic.

Project: moxis (XiTrust E-Digital Signature Platform)
Section: Tech Stack

Tech Stack

- Next.js 16 & React 19
- Custom Atomic Design System (Figma)
- Python & FastAPI
- Local LLMs (Ollama)
- Monorepo Architecture

Project: moxis (XiTrust E-Digital Signature Platform)
Section: My Role & Contributions

My Role & Contributions

- **Lead Architecture & Engineering:** Designed a highly scalable monorepo architecture unifying multiple complex applications into a single, cohesive ecosystem powered by a shared Atomic Design System.
- **Full-Stack Modernization:** Built the next-generation frontend utilizing Next.js 16 and React 19, backed by a high-performance, strictly typed Python FastAPI service layer.
- **Design Engineering Strategy:** Built a comprehensive design system directly connecting Figma to our codebase. Orchestrated a rigorous feedback loop: bouncing ideas from high-fidelity Figma models to working code-based prototypes, ensuring perfectly validated interaction models before final production rollout.

Project: moxis (XiTrust E-Digital Signature Platform)
Section: Interesting Details

Interesting Details

- **"Vibe Coding" & Intelligent Workflows:** Pushed the boundaries of standard enterprise UX by natively integrating local LLMs via Ollama. This advanced capability successfully transformed traditionally static, repetitive forms into "AI-augmented" fluid conversations.
- **Humanizing Complexity:** The major achievement of this modernization was taking an extremely complex, security-critical domain (Enterprise Digital Signatures) and creating a frontend interface that felt as dynamic, playful, and responsive as the best modern consumer apps.

Project: Wagner BIG CITY Pizza (Nestlé)
Section: Introduction

# Wagner BIG CITY Pizza (Nestlé)

Project: Wagner BIG CITY Pizza (Nestlé)
Section: Overview

Overview

A modular SocialAR campaign designed to revitalize Wagner's BIG CITY Pizza brand and increase social media reach among young consumers. We created nine distinct AR experiences published directly to Instagram and TikTok, merging physical product packaging with engaging digital interactions to generate over a million impressions.

Project: Wagner BIG CITY Pizza (Nestlé)
Section: Tech Stack

Tech Stack

- SocialAR (Instagram & TikTok Filters)
- Facial Recognition & Tracking (Wink/Nod controls)
- Image Tracking (Physical Object Recognition)

Project: Wagner BIG CITY Pizza (Nestlé)
Section: My Role & Contributions

My Role & Contributions

- **AR Experience Developer:** Developed nine modular AR experiences across three publication waves, scaling rapidly to represent different target cities.
- **Game Mechanics & Interaction:** Engineered "hero games" where users controlled the gameplay entirely via facial expressions (winking and nodding) to collect pizza slice power-ups and chase high scores.
- **Physical-to-Digital Bridge:** Programmed an image tracker that recognized the physical pizza boxes in real-time, unlocking surprising Easter eggs for customers directly in the supermarket aisle.

Project: Wagner BIG CITY Pizza (Nestlé)
Section: Interesting Details

Interesting Details

- **No-App Frictionless Entry:** The experiences were published natively on Instagram and TikTok, eliminating the barrier of an app download and encouraging rapid viral sharing.
- **Face-Controlled Gameplay:** The hero games didn't use touch; they uniquely utilized facial motion tracking (winking/nodding) to make the experience playful, intuitive, and highly shareable as selfies.
- **Supermarket Surprises:** The pizza box became a digital gateway. Scanning the packaging anywhere—even in the store—activated the SocialAR effects.
- **High Engagement:** Since its launch in July 2020, the filters and games garnered over 1,000,000 impressions and more than 20,000 documented user reactions and gameplay clips.

Project: Wagner BIG CITY Pizza (Nestlé)

Project: StopOverfishing (Oceana)
Section: Introduction

# StopOverfishing (Oceana)

Project: StopOverfishing (Oceana)
Section: Overview

Overview

An interactive web experience created for the environmental organization Oceana to make the issue of overfishing visible. Users design their own low-poly fish with a personal message, and every shared social media post adds a unique fish to a real-time, lively virtual ocean, turning individual engagement into a massive visible swarm.

Project: StopOverfishing (Oceana)
Section: Tech Stack

Tech Stack

- React & Three.js (WebGL)
- Node.js & PostgreSQL
- Python (Twitter Scraping Service)
- AWS

Project: StopOverfishing (Oceana)
Section: My Role & Contributions

My Role & Contributions

- **Web Developer & Creative Technologist:** Architected and developed the interactive web experience from research and prototyping to launch.
- **Real-Time Swarm Rendering:** Engineered the performant Three.js underwater world, rendering massive swarms of low-poly fish with vibrant colors and natural movements across various devices.
- **Social Media Synchronization:** Built a robust Python and Node.js backend pipeline that continuously scraped Oceana hashtags in real-time and synchronized new entries via AWS cloud solutions to update the client-side swarm instantly.

Project: StopOverfishing (Oceana)
Section: Interesting Details

Interesting Details

- **The Fish Creator:** Playfully designed tool allowing users to customize colorful, low-poly fish that carry their personal conservation message.
- **Real-Time Synchronized Ocean:** A cloud service monitors hashtags and updates all active visitors simultaneously, letting everyone watch the virtual ocean grow in real-time as the campaign spreads.
- **Accessible Low-Poly Aesthetics:** Natural swarm movements and vibrant aesthetics created an emotional connection, making the serious topic of overfishing tangible and inviting without feeling explicitly technical.

content:
Project: Super RTL (Woozle Goozle) - Woozle Goozle App with Voice Control
Section: Overview

Overview

An interactive application designed for children to cultivate a conversational friendship with the TV character Woozle Goozle. It features autonomous voice control, a vast video library, and a living 3D digital transformation of the original hand puppet.

content:
Project: Super RTL (Woozle Goozle) - Woozle Goozle App with Voice Control
Section: My Role & Contributions

My Role & Contributions

**Lead Developer**

- Responsible for the React Native UI components, video logic, and overall application flow control.
- Provided Unity support to integrate the virtual environment and animated scenes.
- Integrated TensorFlow and Dialogflow for the custom speech recognition and conversational logic.

Project: Super RTL (Woozle Goozle) - Woozle Goozle App with Voice Control
Section: Interesting Details

Interesting Details

- **Custom Dialogue Engine:** Created a custom database checking against ~1250 unique keywords mapped to over 650 specifically animated sequences.
- **Physical to Digital:** Transitioned the physical hand puppet into a digital 3D character using custom furless shaders while painstakingly imitating the original movements and mannerisms.
- **Continuous Content Delivery:** Built a CMS that allows for quick additions of topics and videos seamlessly combined with lip syncing technology for ever-expanding dialog situations.
